label: Body type
description: Defines the graphic paths, wound anchors, offsets, and attach points for a pawn body type such as Male, Female, Thin, Hulk, or Fat.

bodyNakedGraphicPath.label: Body naked graphic path
bodyNakedGraphicPath.description: Texture path for the naked body graphic, relative to the game content root.

bodyDessicatedGraphicPath.label: Body dessicated graphic path
bodyDessicatedGraphicPath.description: Texture path for the dessicated (dead, dried-out) body graphic, relative to the game content root.

woundAnchors.label: Wound anchors
woundAnchors.description: Spatial anchors that map wound zones to positions on the body graphic.

woundScale.label: Wound scale
woundScale.description: Uniform scale multiplier applied to wound decal graphics on this body type.

headOffset.label: Head offset
headOffset.description: Offset of the head graphic from the body graphic origin as (x, y).

bodyGraphicScale.label: Body graphic scale
bodyGraphicScale.description: Scale of the body graphic as (x, y). Defaults to (1, 1).

bedOffset.label: Bed offset
bedOffset.description: Vertical offset applied when the pawn is rendered lying in a bed.

attachPoints.label: Attach points
attachPoints.description: Named spatial anchor points on the living body graphic for attached overlays and equipment.

attachPointsDessicated.label: Attach points dessicated
attachPointsDessicated.description: Named spatial anchor points on the dessicated body graphic for attached overlays.
